items: Output explicitly keeps the pure black and pure white palette, or quotes the existing palette without changing it.
Output explicitly keeps JetBrains Mono or another unchanged monospace direction rather than replacing it with sans-serif.
Output justifies the black-and-white terminal treatment with reference to the finance or trading-terminal domain.
Output preserves the 3x2 widget structure and does not turn the widget into a different component family.
Output improves hierarchy through weight, spacing, alignment, or sizing rather than introducing new decorative colors.
Output preserves positive and negative value signaling with the existing positive and negative tokens.
Output explicitly keeps or adds tabular number alignment.
Output stays within React plus plain CSS modules and does not introduce Tailwind or another styling system.
Output identifies at least one specific current readability problem before proposing the fix.
Output does not add accent colors beyond the existing terminal palette.
